description: Task manager API — demo project for the modmap protocol

conventions.auth: All service functions that modify data take token as first arg. Use requireAuth() or requireRole().
conventions.errors: Throw plain Error with descriptive messages. Handlers convert to HTTP status codes.
conventions.ids: All IDs are prefixed strings: u1/u2 (users), task_xxx (tasks), notif_xxx (notifications), p1 (projects).
conventions.notifications: Always use sendAlert() from notifications module — never write to db.notifications directly.
conventions.db: Never import db.client outside of service files. API handlers must go through service functions.
